title: Selbyana cochleata
taxonomy: Selbyana cochleata is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Moraceae. It is a member of the genus Selbyana and the order Rosales. The plant's classification places it within the phylum Magnoliophyta and kingdom Plantae. The family Moraceae is a group of plants commonly known as the mulberry family. Selbyana cochleata's classification also indicates its relationship to other plants in the same order and family.
